HomePage.subtitulo: Tlalchichi figures inspired by Colima's clay dogs — unique PET plastic pieces. Keychains, planters, piggy banks and bowls.
HomePage.historia_texto: Tlalchichis are figures inspired by pre-Hispanic ceramics from Colima, Mexico. 3D printed PET plastic replicas — keychains, planters and more.

Story.caption: Pre-Hispanic ceramics
Story.texto_1: The term "Tlalchichi" comes from the Nahuatl "tlalli" (earth) and "chichi" (dog), meaning "dog of the earth." It represents the iconic ceramic figures created by the ancient cultures of western Mexico.
Story.texto_2: These pieces were not mere ornaments — they were placed in tombs to guide the souls of the deceased through Mictlán. Today, our replicas keep that connection to Colima's history and spirituality alive.

Process.subtitulo: Each piece follows a careful process to ensure the highest quality.

About.subtitulo: Dog of the earth — a millenary tradition from Colima
About.intro: The term "Tlalchichi" comes from the Nahuatl "tlalli" (earth) and "chichi" (dog), meaning "dog of the earth." This word is used in the state of Colima, Mexico, to refer to the famous pre-Hispanic ceramic figures representing dogs, created by the ancient cultures that inhabited western Mexico.
About.intro_2: Colima Tlalchichis are much more than simple clay figurines: they represent one of the most important artistic and spiritual expressions of the pre-Hispanic cultures of western Mexico. These unique pieces have transcended millennia and are now recognized worldwide as icons of pre-Columbian art.
About.espiritual_texto: Mesoamerican cultures believed that dogs represented guides for the souls of the dead. The ceramic Tlalchichis placed in tombs had a fundamental function: to accompany and guide the soul of the deceased through the dangers of Mictlán, the Aztec underworld.
About.espiritual_texto_2: According to Mexica mythology, the god Xólotl created the xoloitzcuintle from a splinter of the Bone of Life. The sacred mission of these dogs was to guide their owners through the nine levels of the underworld until reaching eternal rest.
About.mision_texto: Share the Tlalchichi culture of Colima with the world through accessible high-quality PET plastic replicas.
About.proceso_texto: Each replica is made from high-resistance PET plastic, capturing the details of the original Tlalchichi figures from Colima.
